hae8ef93eg893eg470ag9ba8gc3eaef3de7f1: You saved my life. I won't forget it.
h43484c4dgd543g4c0ag982fg66607b90c648: I have been so blind, that an outsider would show me the way of Silvanus.
h4038a25dgae9fg41a6ga8a0g64f744c7dc22: After all I've done, you've no reason to believe me, but... I'm grateful.
hcd2c819bg0d10g402aga3e0geba92b12246c: Halsin's cancelled the rite and I will face judgment. My fate belongs with the Treefather.
ha87aebd0gc00eg44c8g9611g85168f10eb64: I sought the shadows and imperiled the grove. Thanks to you, I've seen light.
h25dfd518gfedbg466bgb816g9f5d57bf1994: This wasn't for you. It was to spare that girl's parents.
h8282386bg2525g41f7g94c0gc2ee1e622a54: Then trust when I say I bear their burden along with my own.
hb23d2d20ge6ffg48a0g8838g4572b0837b21: Justice will be done- the circle will see to that. Cold comfort for them, but comfort nonetheless.
ha0c7db81g1665g4d56g8097g149369f2fdc5: The light welcomes even those who have strayed.
h8f227d14g2daeg4daag9152g5254931e0fd7: I'll use it to heal blight wherever it reaches.
h2f207d7ag7835g4e11g8622g35edc81e6858: And I'll remember a serpent lives within me, waiting to strike. Treefather guide me, that I choose my targets more wisely.
hdbb1961ag1c3fg45ccg8466g9da7ed0c8ef6: Don't let me think about it too long. I'll start having regrets.
heac61435gdfe1g493cg91c5g0e26604f6268: Then I won't stretch your patience. But do allow me one last word:
h386f1ec7gb823g4fd2g94bcg3bb21997b5dc: 'Mercy'. You carry it with you. And now I must carry it with me.
h154c1bd2g5f6dg4f18gb74eg34776d79580e: Saving you was one matter. Forgiving you is another.
h17a0e711g5483g4bbdg9e14gd783dc4d5de2: Don't saddle yourself with that loathing. I will carry it for us both.
h7a29ded4ge91ag44b9g9ec3g0e37aba2a176: You can trust that Silvanus will punish me for it twice over.
h0b1c95f7g0824g4e85ga928g95ca361b5378: May the sun rise in the valley...
h55fc63e6gc844g48efga70bge96df87e0578: ... and may the wind carry you to mount's peak. Until we meet again.
h133fe5d0g1542g4408g931bg4a7393647bcf: I will cancel the rite and subject myself to the circle for judgement.
h202a6fa1g92cfg4996g913fg8734d9be56b9: Halsin's cancelled the rite and I will face judgment. My fate belongs with the Treefather.
h961b3d9eg8b4dg452cg8083gcd42a9340153: The grove is forever in your debt. Walk freely among us, for as long as the sun sets and rises.
h92cbeffcg70dbg4e60g9412gb5c621682d74: Peace. Enjoy it while it lasts.
